title: lappula spinocarpos subsp. ceratophora
intro: Lappula spinocarpos subsp. ceratophora, also known as the Ceratophora Lappula, is a plant species within the family Boraginaceae. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lappula spinocarpos subsp. ceratophora include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues and skin conditions. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
